conflicts.description: The previous continuity sheet placed Nate and Sarah's first post-overwrite sex scene in late July, but Chapter 5 places it after an eleven-night avoidance stretch and after Sarah's early-August change in tone.
conflicts.canonical_value: First sexual encounter occurs in early August 2005.
conflicts.resolution_note: The chapter's causal sequence is explicit: Sarah has already stopped accepting excuses by the beginning of August, and the sex scene happens on the eleventh night after that avoidance pattern starts.

conflicts.description: The previous sheet gave Nate's first sight of Mort as July 13-14, 2005. Chapter 3 dates the outing specifically to July 13, 2005.
conflicts.canonical_value: Nate first sees Mort alive on July 13, 2005.
conflicts.resolution_note: The newspaper purchase and dashboard check both pin the chapter to July 13, so the wider date range in the prior sheet was unnecessarily loose.

conflicts.description: The previous sheet fixed Nate's first entry into Lazar's Hardware and promise to Mort to November 5, 2005. The manuscript supports only 'the first week of November.'
conflicts.canonical_value: Nate enters Lazar's Hardware and makes the promise in the first week of November 2005.
conflicts.resolution_note: No line in the chapter gives an exact day, so the updated sheet keeps the most precise range the manuscript actually states.

conflicts.description: The previous sheet used a broad December 15-20 window for Nate signing the demolition paperwork. Chapter 16 supports a more exact date sequence ending on Monday, December 19, 2005.
conflicts.canonical_value: Nate signs the Eastbridge final site closeout packet on December 19, 2005.
conflicts.resolution_note: The chapter states there are twelve days left until the December 28 demolition, then walks through Saturday, Sunday, and Monday morning before the signature. That sequence is embedded in the chapter's structure and is more precise than the prior date range.
